title: An injected post
description: Example PB-backed post — author these in your PRIVATE repo and seed them.
body:
# Hello from PocketBase

This post lives in the `posts` collection, not in git. Author it in your private repo and seed it with `seed.ts` (no rebuild).

- Markdown is rendered at runtime with `marked`.
- Code blocks are plain `<pre>` (no Shiki highlighting — that's build-time MDX only).

```js
console.log('runtime-rendered');
```

Set `gated: true` to require the recruiter session to read it.
